title: Dashboard Group By Board Gantt With Group Summaries Shown by Board

posts.author: jwoodson1191 (Jeff Woodson)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi all,

I am currently using a single board per project with the groups serving as project phases. I am aggregating these boards into a single dashboard to see an overview of the projects. I would like a way to group the gantt timeline by board (which I am doing currently) but show the group summaries instead of all the items for each board.

Thanks!

posts.author: Chris.Monday (Chris Houston)
posts.cookedHtml: I have a similar issue. I run projects in their own boards, but then on the dashboard gannt where I’ve connected the boards, I can’t arrange the projects by board and then by group. This seems like an easy fix, any help appreciated!

posts.author: cynbastos (Cyn Bastos)
posts.cookedHtml: I have the opposite issue - i have projects in separate boards, and I don’t want the grouping to be by board, I want it to be by a dropdown that’s consistent in each board. It groups by board natively and then the dropdown
